title: rosa × dumetorum var. submitis
intro: Rosa × dumetorum var. submitis, a lesser-known variety of Rosa dumetorum, is a hybrid rose species that belongs to the Rosaceae family. It is primarily known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiseptic effects, making it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits associated with Rosa × dumetorum var. submitis include reducing fever, soothing digestive problems, and alleviating respiratory issues, such as coughs and colds. Herbal preparations, including teas and infusions, can be made from the leaves, flowers, and stems of this plant, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and optimal usage.
